title: Advances in Computer Games 13
text: Home * Conferences * Advances in Computer Games 13 < Prev Next > The Red Brick, Tilburg University [1] Advances in Computer Games 13 , from November 20 to 22, 2011 , Tilburg University , Tilburg [2] , The Netherlands . In conjunction with the 16th Computer Olympiad , the WCCC 2011 , and the WCSC 2011 .
